dashboard.title: Activity Summary
dashboard.loadError: Failed to load daily digest. Please try again later.

updates.title: Updates
updates.staleActionBlocked: Update approval is temporarily blocked because status is stale. Click Check now to refresh.
updates.streamIssue: Live update stream has temporary issues. Falling back to polling.
updates.policyIntegrity: All artifacts must pass checksum verification before install.
updates.policySignature: Ed25519 signature verification is required for release artifacts.
updates.policyRollback: Failed restarts trigger automatic rollback to the previous binary.
updates.channelStableDesc: Production-ready releases. Recommended for most users.
updates.channelPreReleaseDesc: Release candidates for testing before stable promotion.
updates.channelNightlyDesc: Bleeding-edge builds. May contain experimental features.
updates.rolledBackReasonRepeatedStartupFailure: The new version failed to start successfully twice in a row. Your previous working version has been restored.

settings.title: Settings
settings.unsavedChangesHint: Save the current settings before leaving this page.
settings.supportDesc: Open a support snapshot, inspect recent runtime logs, and file a GitHub bug report with the right context.
settings.supportDialogDesc: Use this panel to review the current diagnostics snapshot before opening a GitHub issue.
settings.supportDeveloperDetailsDesc: Show recent native logs plus bridged web warnings and raw troubleshooting details.
settings.supportLoadFailed: Failed to load the current diagnostics snapshot.
settings.supportLogsLoadFailed: Failed to load recent runtime logs.
settings.supportLogsCopied: Recent logs copied to the clipboard.
settings.supportCopyFailed: Failed to copy the requested details.
settings.supportIssueFallback: Diagnostics were unavailable, so the issue link was opened with a minimal template.
settings.supportOpenIssueFailed: Could not open the GitHub issue page.
settings.supportNoLogs: No recent runtime logs were found.
settings.exportDescription: Export the last 7 days of data in JSON or CSV format.
settings.exportEventsDesc: Activity records, app switches, window changes
settings.retentionAutoDelete: Old data will be automatically deleted
settings.portRestart: Requires app restart to take effect
settings.allowExternalDesc: Allow connections from IPs other than 127.0.0.1
settings.allowExternalIntegrationOnly: External access only exposes the integration API. Configure web.integration_auth_token in config.json before enabling this toggle.
settings.notifIdleDesc: Notify when inactive for a period
settings.permissionSectionDesc: Check whether desktop integrations required by ONESHIM are currently reachable.
settings.permissionSectionDescMac: Grant the required macOS permissions so ONESHIM can capture context reliably.
settings.permissionSectionDescLinux: Linux usually does not require extra prompts, but session services still need to be reachable.
settings.permissionSectionDescWindows: Windows access is usually available without separate prompts, but desktop integrations should still be verified.
settings.permissionCheckFailedDesc: ONESHIM could not read the current desktop access state. Retry the check after returning from your OS settings.
settings.permissionAccessibilityDesc: Needed for focused element tracking and GUI context analysis.
settings.permissionScreenCaptureDesc: Needed to capture screenshots for timeline and insights.
settings.permissionMacNotificationsDesc: Notification delivery is managed in macOS System Settings and cannot be verified automatically yet.
settings.permissionMacNotificationsDescGranted: Desktop notifications are enabled for ONESHIM.
settings.permissionMacNotificationsDescPrompt: ONESHIM has not requested notification permission yet. Request it so reminders and coaching prompts can appear.
settings.permissionMacNotificationsDescDenied: Notifications are turned off for ONESHIM in macOS System Settings. Enable them manually if you want reminders and coaching prompts.
settings.permissionMacNotificationsDescProvisiona: Notifications are available, but macOS may deliver them quietly.
settings.permissionMacNotificationsDescEphemeral: Notifications are temporarily available for this session.
settings.permissionMacNotificationsDescFallback: Refresh after changing notification settings in macOS System Settings.
settings.permissionNotificationRequestFollowUp: Check the macOS notification prompt or System Settings, then refresh the status if needed.
settings.permissionNotificationsDesc: Used for break reminders and coaching prompts.
settings.permissionLinuxAccessibilityDesc: AT-SPI session availability controls focused element context on Linux.
settings.permissionLinuxScreenCaptureDesc: Screen capture availability depends on your compositor and desktop session settings.
settings.permissionLinuxNotificationsDesc: Notification delivery is managed by your desktop session.
settings.permissionWindowsDesc: Windows does not usually require separate OS permissions for accessibility or screen capture. Notifications can still depend on system notification settings.
settings.permissionWindowsAccessibilityDesc: Windows accessibility APIs are typically available without a separate approval prompt.
settings.permissionWindowsScreenCaptureDesc: Screen capture is usually available when ONESHIM can access your active desktop session.
settings.permissionWindowsNotificationsDesc: Notification delivery depends on your Windows notification settings.
settings.permissionAttentionDesc: If a service is unavailable, check your desktop session settings and reopen ONESHIM.
settings.permissionAttentionDescMac: If a required permission is missing, re-open the setup guide and approve it in System Settings.
settings.permissionManualCheckDescMac: Some macOS settings, such as notifications, must still be reviewed manually in System Settings.
settings.permissionManualCheckDesc: Some desktop integrations cannot be verified automatically yet. Confirm the related OS settings manually if needed.
settings.autoExcludeDesc: Automatically exclude banking, password managers from capture
settings.piiDesc: Mask personal information in collected data
settings.scheduleEnabledDesc: Only collect data during specified hours/days
settings.pauseOnLockDesc: Stop collection when screen is locked
settings.pauseOnBatteryDesc: Stop collection in battery saver mode
settings.telemetryDesc: Control remote telemetry data sent to the server.
settings.crashReportsDesc: Send crash reports when errors occur
settings.bugReportGenerateDesc: Generate a diagnostic report with system information, health status, and recent activity. Personal data is filtered based on the PII level you choose.
settings.bugReportPiiStandard: Standard - Masks emails, phone numbers, credit cards
settings.bugReportPiiStrict: Strict - Also masks API keys, IPs, file paths
settings.bugReportIncludeLogsDesc: Attach recent native runtime logs to the report.
settings.bugReportGenerateFailed: Could not generate the bug report.
settings.bugReportShareDesc: Choose how to share your bug report. The Bug ID helps correlate your report across channels.
settings.bugReportOpenGitHubDesc: Pre-filled issue template with environment details.
settings.bugReportOpenFailed: Could not open the GitHub issue page.
settings.bugReportCopyJsonDesc: Full diagnostic bundle in JSON format.
settings.bugReportExportDesc: Save the report as a JSON file to disk.
settings.bugReportExportFailed: Failed to export the bug report.
settings.bugReportEmailSupportDesc: Open a pre-filled email to the support team.
settings.savedFull: Settings saved. Some settings require app restart.

ai.quickSetupDesc: Choose a provider to get started. You can change this anytime.
ai.connectionFailed: Connection failed — check your API key
ai.ollamaRunning: Make sure Ollama is running on
ai.copilotOauth: GitHub Copilot requires OAuth authentication. Connect via the advanced settings below.

audio.title: Audio & Speech-to-Text
audio.delete_confirm: Delete the downloaded model? You can re-download it later.
audio.vad_sensitivity_hint: Lower = more sensitive. Increase if background noise triggers false detections.
audio.vad_silence_hint: How long to wait in silence before ending an utterance.
audio.api_key_hint: Your API key is stored locally and sent directly to the provider.

privacy.title: Privacy Management
privacy.deleteAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all data?
privacy.subtitle: View and delete collected data
privacy.deleteByRangeDesc: Selectively delete data for a specific period
privacy.dataTypesHint: Data types to delete (all if none selected)
privacy.deleteAllDesc: Permanently delete all collected data. This cannot be undone.
privacy.dataInfo1: All data is stored only on your local computer and never sent externally
privacy.dataInfo2: Sensitive information in screenshots (emails, credit card numbers) is automatically masked
privacy.dataInfo3: Setting a retention period will automatically delete old data
privacy.dataInfo4: You can view and delete collected data from this page at any time
privacy.confirmDeleteAllMsg:
Are you sure you want to delete all data?

This cannot be undone and all screenshots, event logs, and system metrics will be permanently deleted.

search.title: Search
search.searchHint: Search by app name, window title, OCR text, or tags

replay.title: Session Replay
replay.imageUnavailable: Unable to load screenshot image. Check retention policy or frame file path health.
replay.sceneUnavailable: Scene analysis unavailable for this frame.
replay.assistantDescription: Click a highlighted element to prepare an automation action.
replay.allowSensitiveInput: Allow sensitive text input under current privacy policy
replay.sceneIntelligenceDisabled: Scene intelligence is disabled in settings.
replay.sceneExecutionDisabled: Scene action execution is disabled in Settings > Automation.

backup.title: Backup / Restore
backup.description: Backup and restore your settings and data as a JSON file.
backup.optionsHint: Including frames and events may result in large backup files.

automation.title: Automation
automation.builtinProfileBindingReadonly: Built-in presets follow the currently active AI profile.
automation.profileBindingSaveError: Could not update the AI profile binding.

settingsAutomation.title: Automation
settingsAutomation.sandboxEnabledDescription: Execute commands in an isolated environment
settingsAutomation.accessModeApiKeyDescription: Use direct HTTP endpoints for provider-hosted or self-hosted services. API keys are only required when the selected surface expects them.
settingsAutomation.accessModeCliDescription: Preferred for subscription-backed products. ONESHIM will guide users through installed provider-owned CLI flows.
settingsAutomation.accessModeOAuthDescription: Experimental managed OAuth path for supported provider surfaces. Prefer installed provider CLIs when available.
settingsAutomation.preferredCliDescription: Use {{surface}} when you want provider-managed auth and subscription entitlements to stay with the installed CLI.
settingsAutomation.placementDescriptionProviderHosted: Requests go to the provider's hosted service.
settingsAutomation.placementDescriptionSelfHosted: You operate this endpoint yourself, such as a local Ollama server.
settingsAutomation.placementDescriptionInstalledCli: Execution runs through a provider-owned CLI installed on this machine.
settingsAutomation.placementDescriptionCustomHosted: Requests go to a custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint you manage or proxy.
settingsAutomation.cliModeProviderSummary: Provider CLI mode keeps OCR and LLM providers on local execution. Supported LLM workflows will use installed provider-owned CLIs through the selected surface.
settingsAutomation.oauthLlmProviderPinned: Managed OAuth currently requires the LLM provider to stay on Remote.
settingsAutomation.providerSelectionLockedCli: Installed provider CLI mode keeps the LLM provider fixed to Remote.
settingsAutomation.providerSelectionLockedOAuth: Managed OAuth keeps the LLM provider fixed to Remote.
settingsAutomation.activeRoutingDescription: These are the effective OCR and LLM paths the runtime will use right now.
settingsAutomation.allowUnredactedExternalOcrDescription: Skip pre-upload PII blur for external OCR (higher quality, lower privacy).
settingsAutomation.sceneActionOverrideEnabledDescription: Temporarily permit sensitive scene typing with explicit reason, approver, and expiry.
settingsAutomation.sceneActionOverrideReasonPlaceholder: Example: calibration for low-confidence OCR workflow
settingsAutomation.sceneIntelligenceEnabledDescription: Enable OCR-based UI structure detection and assistant recommendations.
settingsAutomation.sceneOverlayEnabledDescription: Render detected UI element boxes on session replay screenshots.
settingsAutomation.sceneAllowExecutionDescription: Permit direct click/type execution from scene coordinates (RPA gate).
settingsAutomation.sceneCalibrationEnabledDescription: Validate whether current scene quality is sufficient before assistant usage.
settingsAutomation.ocrValidationEnabledDescription: Filter low-confidence or invalid OCR results before downstream automation.
settingsAutomation.fallbackToLocalDescription: Fall back to local model when external API fails
settingsAutomation.apiKeyStoredHint: This secret is currently stored in {{backend}}. Enter a new key here to replace it.
settingsAutomation.noAuthSurfaceDescription: This surface does not require an API key. Leave the credential field empty and connect to the local or self-hosted endpoint directly.
settingsAutomation.secretProjectionEnabledDescription: Permit ONESHIM-managed CLI and bridge compatibility flows for this stored secret.
settingsAutomation.modelSelectionUnsupportedSurface: This surface does not support selecting a model explicitly. ONESHIM will use the surface's built-in OCR or provider default path.
settingsAutomation.ocrModelUnsupported: The selected model is not known to support image-based OCR on this surface. Choose a compatible multimodal model.
settingsAutomation.ocrModelCompatibilityUnknown: ONESHIM could not confirm OCR compatibility for {{model}} on this surface. Use a known multimodal model or verify with model discovery before saving.
settingsAutomation.ocrModelCompatibilityUnknownRejected: ONESHIM requires a known OCR-compatible model for this surface. {{model}} is not catalogued yet, so choose a known multimodal model before saving.
settingsAutomation.llmModelUnsupported: The selected model is not known to support this LLM surface. Choose a compatible model for the selected execution path.
settingsAutomation.llmModelCompatibilityUnknown: ONESHIM could not confirm LLM compatibility for {{model}} on this surface. Verify the model or load the catalog before saving.
settingsAutomation.llmModelCompatibilityUnknownRejected: ONESHIM requires a known compatible LLM model for this surface. {{model}} is not catalogued yet, so choose a known supported model before saving.
settingsAutomation.selfHostedCustomEndpointStatus: This self-hosted surface is using a custom endpoint. Readiness was not probed for that endpoint, so verify the local server manually.
settingsAutomation.savedProfilesDescription: Save the full active AI provider setup and switch between profiles without rebuilding OCR, LLM, and policy settings by hand.
settingsAutomation.savedProfilesSelectedHint: You are editing {{name}}. Save settings to persist the current AI provider changes back into this profile.
settingsAutomation.savedProfilesCustomHint: The current AI provider setup is custom. Save it as a named profile to reuse it later.
settingsAutomation.profileNameRequired: Enter a profile name before saving.
settingsAutomation.noCompatibleProviderSurface: No compatible provider surface is available for this mode.
settingsAutomation.ocrStrategyMultimodal: This OCR surface runs through a multimodal model. Prefer image-capable models and verify compatibility before saving custom model IDs.
settingsAutomation.ocrStrategyVisionApi: This OCR surface runs through a dedicated vision API. Model selection may be limited or unavailable depending on the endpoint.
settingsAutomation.managedOAuthSurfaceDescription: This surface uses provider-managed OAuth. ONESHIM does not ask for an API key or editable endpoint here.
settingsAutomation.subprocessSurfaceDescription: This surface runs through an installed provider-owned CLI. Authentication and subscription entitlements stay with the provider CLI.
settingsAutomation.modelDiscoveryNoModels: No models were returned for this provider configuration.
settingsAutomation.modelDiscoveryMissingConfig: Configure remote endpoint, provider, and API key first.
settingsAutomation.modelDiscoveryMissingKey: Enter full API key to discover models.
settingsAutomation.modelDiscoveryUnsupportedSurface: Model discovery is not available for the selected provider surface.

settingsOAuth.title: Connection
settingsOAuth.desktopOnly: OAuth connection is only available in the desktop app.
settingsOAuth.disconnectedDescription: Connect your account to enable OAuth-based access. No API key required.
settingsOAuth.connecting: Waiting for authorization in your browser…
settingsOAuth.openBrowserHint: If the page did not open automatically, use this button to continue in your browser.
settingsOAuth.openBrowserFailed: We could not open the authorization page. Try again or restart the flow.
settingsOAuth.disclaimer: Tokens are stored in your OS keychain and never leave this device.
settingsOAuth.portConflict: Could not start the authorization server — the callback port is already in use. Close other instances and try again.
settingsOAuth.timeout: Authorization timed out before the callback was received. Restart the flow and try again.
settingsOAuth.unavailable: OAuth is not available on this device right now. Check desktop keychain access and feature support.
settingsOAuth.noRefreshToken: No refresh token — manual re-authentication will be required when token expires
settingsOAuth.reauthDescription: Your OAuth session has expired. Please reconnect.

managed_oauth.available: This experimental managed OAuth path is available on this device. It is not the preferred setup path.
managed_oauth.unavailable: Direct OAuth is unavailable on this device. Desktop keychain support is required.

subprocess_cli.available: Codex CLI is installed and authenticated. ONESHIM can use the provider-owned CLI path for supported workflows on this device.
subprocess_cli.auth_required: Codex CLI is installed but not authenticated yet. Run the provider-owned CLI sign-in flow first, then return to this panel.
subprocess_cli.partially_available: Codex CLI was detected. ONESHIM can prefer the installed provider-owned CLI path when the CLI is authenticated and the requested workflow is supported.
subprocess_cli.unavailable: Codex CLI is not installed or not available on PATH. Install and sign in through the provider CLI for the preferred product-backed path.

subprocess_cli.available: Claude Code CLI is installed and authenticated. ONESHIM can use the provider-owned CLI path for supported workflows on this device.
subprocess_cli.auth_required: Claude Code CLI is installed but not authenticated yet. Run the provider-owned CLI sign-in flow first, then return to this panel.
subprocess_cli.partially_available: Claude Code CLI was detected. ONESHIM can prefer the installed provider-owned CLI path when the CLI is authenticated and the requested workflow is supported.
subprocess_cli.unavailable: Claude Code CLI is not installed or not available on PATH.

managed_oauth.available: Google OAuth is available on this device. Configure a Desktop OAuth client ID to connect Vision OCR without storing an API key.
managed_oauth.unavailable: Google OAuth is unavailable on this device. Desktop keychain support and a configured Google OAuth client ID are required.
managed_oauth.setup: Create or supply a Google Desktop OAuth client ID for ONESHIM, then restart the app before starting the Vision OCR sign-in flow.

subprocess_cli.available: Gemini CLI is installed and authenticated. ONESHIM can use the provider-owned CLI path for supported workflows on this device.
subprocess_cli.auth_required: Gemini CLI is installed but not authenticated yet. Run the provider-owned CLI sign-in flow first, then return to this panel.
subprocess_cli.partially_available: Gemini CLI was detected. ONESHIM can prefer the installed provider-owned CLI path when the CLI is authenticated and the requested workflow is supported.
subprocess_cli.unavailable: Gemini CLI is not installed or not available on PATH.

local_http.available: Ollama appears reachable on the configured local HTTP port. ONESHIM can call the self-hosted endpoint directly.
local_http.partially_available: ONESHIM could not complete the local readiness probe for Ollama. Verify the local server and endpoint configuration.
local_http.unavailable: Ollama was not reachable on the configured local HTTP port. Start the local server before using this self-hosted surface.

openaiManagedOAuth.available: This experimental managed OAuth path is available on this device. It is not the preferred setup path.
openaiManagedOAuth.unavailable: Direct OAuth is unavailable on this device. Desktop keychain support is required.

openaiSubprocessCli.available: Codex CLI is installed and authenticated. ONESHIM can use the provider-owned CLI path for supported workflows on this device.
openaiSubprocessCli.authRequired: Codex CLI is installed but not authenticated yet. Run the provider-owned CLI sign-in flow first, then return to this panel.
openaiSubprocessCli.partiallyAvailable: Codex CLI was detected. ONESHIM can prefer the installed provider-owned CLI path when the CLI is authenticated and the requested workflow is supported.
openaiSubprocessCli.unavailable: Codex CLI is not installed or not available on PATH. Install and sign in through the provider CLI for the preferred product-backed path.

anthropicSubprocessCli.available: Claude Code CLI is installed and authenticated. ONESHIM can use the provider-owned CLI path for supported workflows on this device.
anthropicSubprocessCli.authRequired: Claude Code CLI is installed but not authenticated yet. Run the provider-owned CLI sign-in flow first, then return to this panel.
anthropicSubprocessCli.partiallyAvailable: Claude Code CLI was detected. ONESHIM can prefer the installed provider-owned CLI path when the CLI is authenticated and the requested workflow is supported.
anthropicSubprocessCli.unavailable: Claude Code CLI is not installed or not available on PATH.

googleSubprocessCli.available: Gemini CLI is installed and authenticated. ONESHIM can use the provider-owned CLI path for supported workflows on this device.
googleSubprocessCli.authRequired: Gemini CLI is installed but not authenticated yet. Run the provider-owned CLI sign-in flow first, then return to this panel.
googleSubprocessCli.partiallyAvailable: Gemini CLI was detected. ONESHIM can prefer the installed provider-owned CLI path when the CLI is authenticated and the requested workflow is supported.
googleSubprocessCli.unavailable: Gemini CLI is not installed or not available on PATH.

suggestions.needFocusTime: You need {minutes} minutes of focus time
suggestions.takeBreak: Consider taking a break after {minutes} minutes of continuous work
suggestions.excessiveCommunication: Communication time is high. Secure some focus time

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro
pomodoro.loadFailed: Failed to load the current timer.
pomodoro.syncFailed: Failed to sync the completed session.

widgets.title: Widgets
widgets.minOneRequired: At least one widget must remain visible

focusAuto.title: Focus Auto-Switch
focusAuto.description: Automatically activate Focus mode based on rules
focusAuto.cooldownDesc: Wait time after deactivation before re-triggering
focusAuto.triggerAppsDesc: Focus activates when these apps are in foreground
focusAuto.schedulesDesc: Focus activates during these time windows

dashboard.title: Warming Up
dashboard.description: ONESHIM is collecting activity data in the background. Open any app and keep working — your first metrics usually appear within a minute.

timeline.title: Screenshot Capture Is Off
timeline.description: Turn on screenshot capture in Settings to build a visual timeline of your day. You can limit captures to specific apps later.

timelineWaiting.title: Capturing Your First Screenshots
timelineWaiting.description: ONESHIM captures the active window every few seconds. Frames should appear within 2–3 minutes after opening your first app. If nothing shows up after 5 minutes, check Screen Recording permission in Settings.

timelineStandalone.title: Desktop Capture Unavailable
timelineStandalone.description: The app is running without live desktop access. Reopen ONESHIM in live desktop mode, then come back to start capturing your activity.

reports.title: Building Your First Report
reports.description: Reports are generated once you've used any monitored app for a continuous hour. Come back after your first work session to see activity breakdowns.

focus.title: Learning Your Focus Patterns
focus.description: Your focus score is calculated from deep-work periods of 15 minutes or longer. Spend some uninterrupted time on any task and your first score will appear here.

replay.title: No Session Records
replay.description: No sessions were recorded in the selected period. Try a different date range or keep the app running to build new sessions.

automation.title: Automation Inactive
automation.description: Automation is turned off. Enable it in Settings to let ONESHIM run approved commands on your behalf.

auditLog.title: No Audit Entries
auditLog.description: Audit entries will appear once ONESHIM executes automation commands on your behalf.

chat.title: Start a Conversation
chat.description: Ask ONESHIM about your work patterns, focus history, or how to improve your routine. Create a new session from the sidebar to begin.

playbooksCoaching.title: No Coaching Templates
playbooksCoaching.description: Coaching templates customize what ONESHIM says and when. New templates will appear here as you or your team add them.

playbooksPresets.title: No Automation Presets
playbooksPresets.description: Automation presets are ready-made workflows for common tasks. Install presets from the catalog or create your own in Settings.

emptyState.filterEmpty: No items match the current filters.

errors.serverOfflineDesc: Could not connect to the ONESHIM agent. Make sure the agent is running.
errors.agentUnreachable: Network error: unable to reach agent
errors.agentCheck: Check that the ONESHIM agent is running

route.title: Something went wrong in this section
route.description: The error has been reported. You can try again or go back to the dashboard.
route.recoveringDescription: This section has crashed repeatedly. Reloading the app to restore normal operation.

recalibration.title: Recalibration
recalibration.noSegments: No segments found for this date range

coaching.title: Coaching History
coaching.dismissError: Could not update the coaching message.
coaching.quietHoursDesc: Coaching messages are suppressed during these time ranges.

profileDesc.FocusGuard: Alerts when you switch context too often
profileDesc.TimeAware: Reminds you of upcoming meetings and deadlines
profileDesc.GoalTracker: Tracks progress toward daily regime goals

coaching.frequencyDesc: How often coaching messages can appear. Applies to all profiles.

habits.title: Habit Tracker
habits.empty: No habit data yet. Streaks will appear once goals are tracked.

onboarding.step1Desc: ONESHIM monitors your desktop activity and provides intelligent suggestions to boost productivity.
onboarding.step2Desc: ONESHIM needs some permissions to work effectively.
onboarding.step2DescMac: macOS requires Accessibility, Screen Recording, and notification access for the full ONESHIM experience.
onboarding.step2DescWindows: Windows usually does not require separate permission prompts, but ONESHIM still depends on desktop access, screen capture, and notification delivery being available.
onboarding.step2DescLinux: Linux usually relies on session services instead of OS prompts. Confirm accessibility, screen capture, and notifications are available in your desktop session.
onboarding.step2RequiredDesc: Grant Accessibility and Screen Recording before continuing.
onboarding.step2RequiredContinueHint: You can move on after the required macOS permissions show as enabled.
onboarding.step2ReadyDesc: Accessibility and Screen Recording are enabled. You can continue.
onboarding.step2ReadyInline: Accessibility and Screen Recording are enabled.
onboarding.step2PermissionCheckFailed: Could not read the current desktop permission state.
onboarding.step2SystemSettingsOpenFailed: Could not open macOS System Settings.
onboarding.step3Desc: Here's what ONESHIM can do for you.
onboarding.step4Desc: You're all set. Start using ONESHIM now.
onboarding.step4Tip: Tip: Press {{shortcut}} anytime to open the Command Palette and jump to any page.

chat.title: AI Sessions
chat.create_hint: Select a transport and press + in the sidebar.
chat.create_session: Create a session to start chatting
chat.create_failed: Failed to create an AI session.
chat.http_surface_help: Choose the direct HTTP provider surface for this session.
chat.model_placeholder: Leave empty to use the default model
chat.tools_placeholder: Optional JSON array of tool definitions
chat.response_format_placeholder: Optional JSON schema or format hint
chat.invalid_tools_json: Tool definitions must be a JSON array of tool definitions.
chat.invalid_response_format_json: Response format must be valid JSON.

policies.title: Execution Policies
policies.emptyDescription: Execution policies control which processes automation can run and under what conditions.

syncTab.title: Cross-Device Sync
syncTab.notEnabled: Sync is not enabled. To activate cross-device sync:
syncTab.step3: Choose a transport (File, Remote, or LAN) in sync settings
syncTab.noPeers: No peers discovered yet. Ensure other devices are on the same network with sync enabled.
